item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) ANESTHESIA KIT PEDS 90-LF, Model Number: DYNJAP10125A Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) ANESTHESIA KIT PEDS 90-LF, Model Number: DYNJAP10125A
item.summary: Convenience Kits contain Covidien Mon-a-Therm General Purpose Temperature Probes Size 9 Fr. Medtronic has issued a recall of specific production lots of the Covidien Mon-a-Therm general purpose temperature probe-size 9 due to an error in its distribution control process. Product details: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) ANESTHESIA KIT PEDS 90-LF, Model Number: DYNJAP10125A
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
